QueenBanquetPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_15_Payout6_4: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
QueenBanquetPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_16_Payout6_5: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
QueenBanquetPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_18_Payout1_1: Some symbols may occupy 2 to 4 symbols' spaces and each of these symbols will represent as a single symbol during payout calculations.
QueenBanquetPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_19_Payout1_2: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
QueenBanquetPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_20_Payout1_3: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3, 4 and 5 only.
QueenBanquetPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_1_Payout2_1: During any spin, some symbols (excluding Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) in reels 2, 3, 4 and/or 5 that occupy 2 to 4 symbols' spaces may have a silver frame around itself.
QueenBanquetPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_2_Payout2_2: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any gold-framed symbol(s) that is involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into Wild symbol.
QueenBanquetPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_2_Payout2_3: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any silver-framed symbol(s) that is involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into a randomly selected symbol (other than Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) with a gold frame around itself.
QueenBanquetPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_1_Payout3_1: At the start of any spin, 2 to 4 consecutive reels in reels 2, 3, 4 and 5 will be randomly selected to be identical reels until the end of the spin.
QueenBanquetPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_2_Payout3_2: Symbols in the bottom reel will not be affected by the Synced Reels Feature.
QueenBanquetPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_1_Payout4_1: 4 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
QueenBanquetPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_2_Payout4_2: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, the win multiplier is x1.
QueenBanquetPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_3_Payout4_3: During any free spin, if there are one or more winning symbols on the reels, after wins are paid and the new symbols have cascaded down, the win multiplier will be increased by 1 .

QueenBanquetRule.Rule1_1: The Queen's Banquet is a 6-reel, 5-row video slot (with an additional reel on bottom of reel 2, 3, 4 and 5) featuring Wilds-on-the-Way and duplicated reels feature.

Rule1_2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{2025} ways - %{32400} ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
Rule1_2.comment: ${minChip} ${maxChip} will be replaced with game specific
Rule1_2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{2025} ways - %{32400} ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.01 to 10.

QueenBanquetRule.Rule1_21: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
